captions.formal: An elevated time-lapse captures vehicles flowing along a multi-lane city street. Yellow-leafed autumn trees and high-rise buildings flank the road under golden-hour lighting.
captions.sarcastic: Behold, the great human achievement: a frantic, sped-up blur of metal boxes rushing past perfectly nice autumn trees.
captions.humorous_tech: Rush hour traffic is just a network switch struggling to route massive data packets down the city's main bandwidth highway. Looks like peak throughput without a single dropped connection.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Under the warm glow of golden hour, a chaotic swarm of blurry cars frantically speeds down a wide avenue, desperately rushing past majestic yellow autumn trees. The stationary foliage seems to silently judge the frantic, motion-blurred traffic zooming by.
